import React,{useEffect}from'react';import{useSearchParams}from'react-router-dom';import{getGoogleUserInfo}from'../services/googleAuth';import{showNotification}from'../assets/notifications';import{useNavigationWithDelay}from'../hooks/useNavigationWithDelay';import{userAPI}from'../services/userAPI';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import Loading from'../components/Loading';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";const GoogleCallback=()=>{const[searchParams]=useSearchParams();const{isLoading,redirectWithDelay}=useNavigationWithDelay();const{googleLoginSuccess}=useAuth();useEffect(()=>{const handleGoogleCallback=async()=>{try{const code=searchParams.get('code');const error=searchParams.get('error');if(error){console.error('Google OAuth error:',error);window.location.href='/?error=google_auth_failed';return;}if(!code){console.error('No authorization code received');window.location.href='/?error=no_code_received';return;}console.log('Received Google auth code:',code);// الحصول على بيانات Google الفعلية من Backend
const googleUserData=await getGoogleUserInfo(code);console.log('Google user data:',googleUserData);const existingUsers=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('users')||'[]');let googleUser=existingUsers.find(u=>u.email===googleUserData.email);if(googleUser){// المستخدم موجود بالفعل - جلب البيانات المحدثة من API ثم تسجيل الدخول
console.log('Found existing user in storage:',googleUser);// جلب البيانات المحدثة من userAPI
const updatedUser=await userAPI.getUserById(googleUser._id);const userToUse=updatedUser||googleUser;console.log('Using updated user data for login:',userToUse);console.log('Calling googleLoginSuccess with user:',userToUse);// Debug data consistency before login
userAPI.debugUserData(userToUse._id);await googleLoginSuccess(userToUse);console.log('googleLoginSuccess completed');}else{// مستخدم جديد عبر Google - إنشاء حساب جديد ثم تسجيل الدخول
const newUser=await userAPI.createUser({email:googleUserData.email,firstName:googleUserData.firstName,lastName:googleUserData.lastName,role:'user'});console.log('New user created via Google:',newUser);console.log('Calling googleLoginSuccess with new user:',newUser);await googleLoginSuccess(newUser);console.log('googleLoginSuccess completed for new user');}}catch(error){console.error('Callback error:',error);showNotification('فشل تسجيل الدخول عبر Google. يرجى المحاولة مرة أخرى.','error');window.location.href='/?error=callback_failed';}};handleGoogleCallback();},[searchParams,googleLoginSuccess]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[isLoading&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Loading,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center",style:{backgroundColor:'#0a0a0a'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"text-center",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-red-600 mx-auto mb-4"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-white text-lg",children:"\u062C\u0627\u0631\u064A \u062A\u0633\u062C\u064A\u0644 \u0627\u0644\u062F\u062E\u0648\u0644..."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-gray-400 text-sm mt-2",children:"\u064A\u0631\u062C\u0649 \u0627\u0644\u0627\u0646\u062A\u0638\u0627\u0631"})]})})]});};export default GoogleCallback;
